notes: Authoritative garment list for WardrobeAssistant. Each item uses photo_media pointing at chat uploads under media/uploads/. Keep ids stable for outfit logic and URLs.

items.description: Charcoal heather zip hoodie — quilted lining, casual layering for cool mornings.
Navy t-shirt with white heraldic crest graphic — relaxed fit casual top.
Cream 'Caltech Up Close 2024' graphic t-shirt — campus event souvenir tee.
Black Calvin Klein jeans — classic fit versatile dark denim.
Burgundy ribbed quarter-zip polo with white/brown shoulder stripes — smart casual.
